summary: Comprehensive testing of automatic shift time tracking system completed. All 17 backend tests passed (100%). All UI flows verified - Start/Pause/Resume/Stop with auto-calculated durations. NO manual hours input anywhere in the system.

issues: Missing data-testid attributes on login form inputs (minor - used placeholder selectors instead)

critical_code_review_comments: Auto time tracking implementation is correct - start_time, pause_time, resume_time, end_time all captured automatically
Duration calculation formula: total_duration = (end - start) - paused_time is working correctly
Live Dashboard correctly shows 'All durations are automatically calculated from shift start/stop times' note
NO manual hours input field exists anywhere - this is correct per requirements
Login.js could use data-testid attributes for better testability
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_KIT_SHIFT and TEST_SSD_SHIFT for shift testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Automatic shift time tracking fully tested. Shifts collection stores: start_time (auto), pauses array [{pause_time, resume_time}], end_time (auto), total_duration_seconds/hours (calculated). Dashboard pulls from shifts collection. All shift control buttons working: Start Collection, Pause, Resume, Stop.
passed_tests: Backend: TestManager1 login with test123
Backend: GET /api/shifts/active - no active shift initially
Backend: POST /api/shifts/start - auto-captures start_time
Backend: POST /api/shifts/start - requires kit, ssd_used, activity_type
Backend: POST /api/shifts/{id}/pause - auto-captures pause_time, changes status to paused
Backend: POST /api/shifts/{id}/resume - auto-captures resume_time, changes status to active
Backend: POST /api/shifts/{id}/stop - auto-captures end_time, calculates total_duration_seconds/hours
Backend: Duration calculation with pauses - correctly subtracts paused time
Backend: Cannot start duplicate shift while one is active
Backend: Cannot pause already paused shift
Backend: Cannot resume already active shift
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/live - returns auto-calculated total_hours
Backend: GET /api/shifts/today - returns completed shifts with durations
Backend: GET /api/shifts - returns shift list
Backend: Shift model rejects manual hours_logged field
Frontend: Actions page shows 'Start Collection' button when no active shift
Frontend: Start Collection dialog requires Kit, SSD, Activity Type selection
Frontend: After start - shows active shift panel with live timer (00:00:01...)
Frontend: Pause button pauses shift (status changes to 'Shift Paused', amber header)
Frontend: Resume button resumes shift (status changes to 'Shift Active', green header)
Frontend: Stop button shows 'Shift completed! Duration: X.XX hours' toast
Frontend: NO manual hours input field anywhere
Frontend: Live Dashboard shows 'automatically calculated' note
Frontend: Live Dashboard displays Total Hours, Completed, Active Now counts
Frontend: Live Dashboard shows Hours per BnB with auto-calculated values
Frontend: Live Dashboard shows Recent Completed Shifts with durations
features_verified: Users just click buttons + input SSD/activity at START (no manual time)
Live timer display during active shift
Pause freezes timer, Resume continues timer
Stop calculates and displays final duration
